title: Extendable Fly Swatter, 2 Pack Strong Manual Fly Swat Pest Telescopic Stainless Steel Handle Adjustable 26.5cm to 73cm Heavy Duty Flyswat for Indoor Outdoor Mosquitoes Flies (Black & Blue)
features: 【Manual Fly Swatter】The heavy-duty manual fly swatter is lightweight and retractable, and the flexible and lightweight telescopic rod is easy to disassemble, comfortable to carry, and easy to operate. It can help you eliminate spiders, wasps, bugs, mosquitoes and other pests, creating a quiet and comfortable environment for you.

【Sturdy and Durable】Made of durable plastic and stainless steel, this fly swatter is highly resistant to breakage and can be operated safely and comfortably even under frequent use, this structure ensures a long service life and effective combat against annoying insects.

【Adjustable Handle】The fly swatter has a telescopic function, and each handle has 4 retractable flexible metal parts, which are durable and sturdy, allowing you to easily operate it according to actual conditions. The length can be changed from 26.5 cm to 73 cm as needed, which can effectively repel insects whether at home or outdoors.

【Anti-Slip Wave Design】The handle part of the portable fly swatter is designed with multiple waves for your convenience to hold and avoid falling off. The non-slip handle is easy to grip, small in size, easy to carry, and can be used at home and outdoors. It can also be easily hung with a hanging ring, which will not take up any space.

【Wide Application】The retractable fly swatter can be used indoors and outdoors, and is perfect for use in the living room, dining room, kitchen, office, or barbecue, camping, picnic, gardening. It can help you control pests easily and effectively, keeping them free from pests.
description: Features: Retractable fly swatter, manual fly swatter pest control, suitable for indoor and outdoor mosquitoes, wasps, bugs and insects. Product name: Retractable fly swatter Specifications: Size: 26.5*9*8.5cm Retractable range: 26.5-73cm Color: black + blue Material: plastic + stainless steel Package includes: 2-pack fly swatters Please note: 1.Please allow slight size error due to manual measurement, different monitors, colors may vary slightly. Thank you for your understanding.
